name: tasky.graph-merge
description: Apply the Judge's decisions to Neo4j. Handles Task node upserts, OWNED_BY / MENTIONS / COMMITTED_IN / ABOUT / SUBTASK_OF edges. All writes happen through the UPSERT_TASK Cypher query in lib/neo4j/queries.ts.

nodes.description: For each kept candidate, run UPSERT_TASK. Collect resulting task ids.
For each subtask candidate, run UPSERT_TASK with parentTaskId set. Creates the SUBTASK_OF edge to the target parent.
For each merge, do NOT create a new node. Instead, update the target task: bump updated_at, append the source_ref to a merged_from array, refresh subtitle if the candidate's is richer.
